steps.t: Quickbeam believes the seed needs to be covered with sandy soil in order to continue to grow. Sandy soil can be found along the river in Fangorn Fores…
Quickbeam needs to ponder how best to support the seed's growth. Return to Quickbeam at Derndingle to hear what he has to say.
Quickbeam has figured out what soil is next needed for the seed. Quickbeam is ready to speak to you at Derndingle.
Quickbeam believes the seed needs to be covered with mossy soil in order to continue to grow. Mossy soil can be found at Wellinghall in Fangorn.
